name: hack-club-cdn
title: Hack Club CDN
description: Upload files to the Hack Club CDN and manage your uploads from Raycast. Requires a Hack Club account (cdn.hackclub.com) and an API token.
author: garyhtou

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Get your API token from cdn.hackclub.com/api_keys after signing in with your Hack Club account.

commands.name: upload-clipboard-file
commands.title: Upload Clipboard File
commands.subtitle: Hack Club CDN · Paste to Upload
commands.description: Uploads whatever's on your clipboard (a copied file, a local path, or a link) to the Hack Club CDN and copies the resulting link.

commands.name: upload-file
commands.title: Upload File
commands.subtitle: Hack Club CDN · Browse & Upload
commands.description: Pick a file from disk or paste its path to upload it to the Hack Club CDN.

commands.name: recent-uploads
commands.title: Recent Uploads
commands.subtitle: Hack Club CDN
commands.description: Browse, copy links from, and delete files you've uploaded from this Mac.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
